title: Basic Instructional Program: Elective Instruction
description: Conroe ISD offers elective courses that give students the opportunity to explore interests beyond their required core subjects, such as arts, technology, and career-related programs. The district follows state guidelines to ensure these courses meet academic standards and are available as part of a well-rounded school experience. Parents and students can use this policy to understand how elective offerings are structured and what governs the district's decisions about which courses are available.
